signals.title: Bilevel Autoresearch: Meta-Autoresearching Itself
signals.abstract: Outer loop meta-optimizes inner autoresearch loop via autonomous code generation. 5x improvement on GPT pretraining benchmarks through discovering combinatorial optimization.

signals.title: Central Dogma Transformer III: Interpretable AI Across DNA, RNA, and Protein
signals.abstract: Interpretable AI predicting protein changes and discovering clinical side effects from in silico knockdown experiments across transcription and translation.

signals.title: Beyond Preset Identities: How Agents Form Stances in Generative Societies
signals.abstract: Agents form endogenous stances overriding presets, exhibiting paradoxical decoupling between stated trust and behavioral change in multiagent LLM communities.

signals.title: Mecha-nudges for Machines: Presentation Changes Influencing AI Decisions
signals.abstract: Etsy listings systematically optimized for machine-usable information post-ChatGPT. AI-targeted presentation changes influence purchasing without degrading human choice.

signals.title: Near-Optimal Solutions for Carbon Capture, Conversion, Storage, and Removal
signals.abstract: Multiple carbon management configurations achieve net-zero in European energy model with minimal cost increases. MGA approach reveals solution diversity.

signals.title: MedObvious: Exposing Medical Moravec's Paradox in VLMs
signals.abstract: Medical VLMs hallucinate anomalies on normal inputs, failing pre-diagnostic sanity checks despite fluent report generation. Exposes fundamental reliability gap.

signals.title: Failure of Contextual Invariance in Gender Inference with LLMs
signals.abstract: Minimal discourse context causes systematic shifts in LLM gender inference, violating bias benchmarking assumptions. Contextually equivalent formulations produce different outputs.

signals.title: Biased Error Attribution in Multi-Agent Human-AI Systems
signals.abstract: Humans systematically misattribute failure causes across agents under delayed feedback, demonstrating amplified cognitive biases in complex human-AI systems.

signals.title: CSTS: Canonical Security Telemetry for AI-Native Cyber Detection
signals.abstract: Entity-relational abstraction for AI cybersecurity improves cross-environment zero-day detection. Identity persistence and temporal invariants enable robust deployment.

signals.title: VTAM: Video-Tactile-Action Models for Complex Physical Interaction
signals.abstract: Multimodal tactile perception enables 90% success in contact-rich tasks, outperforming vision-only baselines by 80% on fine-grained force awareness.

signals.title: Code Review Agent Benchmark: Only 40% Solved by Existing AI Agents
signals.abstract: Curated benchmark shows AI code review agents collectively solve only 40% of tasks, revealing significant human-agent collaboration potential.

signals.title: Byzantine-Robust Differentially Private Federated Optimization
signals.abstract: State-of-the-art convergence for federated learning under Byzantine attacks with differential privacy, without requiring bounded gradients.

signals.title: Off-Policy Value-Based RL for Large Language Models (ReVal)
signals.abstract: Bellman-update-based value method enables efficient replay-buffer training for LLMs, outperforming policy-based methods on mathematical reasoning.

signals.title: SortedRL: 50%+ Bubble Reduction in LLM RL Training
signals.abstract: Length-aware scheduling reduces RL training bottlenecks with 3.9-18.4% performance improvements on reasoning tasks.

signals.title: Dark Matter Detection Through Rydberg Atom Transducer
signals.abstract: Hybrid detection platform targets meV-scale bosonic dark matter with projected sensitivity to QCD axion band using Rydberg atom upconversion.

signals.title: Information-Theoretic Scaling Laws of Neural Quantum States
signals.abstract: Scaling laws connecting quantum state mutual information to neural network capacity, revealing architecture-dependent differences between RNN and Transformer.

signals.title: PAC-Bayesian Generalization Bounds for Quantum Models
signals.abstract: First non-uniform data-dependent generalization bounds for quantum models with general channels.

signals.title: Multi-Ion Optical Clock with 5×10⁻¹⁹ Uncertainty
signals.abstract: State-of-the-art multi-ion Sr clock reduces measurement time while maintaining systematic uncertainty below 10⁻²⁰.

signals.title: General Machine Learning: Theory for Learning Under Variable Regimes
signals.abstract: Foundational learning theory framework for evolving learner conditions, establishing core concepts around admissible transport and protected stability.

signals.title: Scalable Quantum Circuit Generation via Majorana Propagation
signals.abstract: ADAPT-VMPE algorithm achieves polynomial-time ground state approximation across 100-qubit molecular ansätze.

signals.title: Targeted Adversarial Traffic for IoT Intrusion Detection Evasion
signals.abstract: Practical evasion attacks against IoT intrusion detection using black-box adversarial methods with proposed defense mechanism.

signals.title: Cooperation in Public Goods Games over Hypergraphs
signals.abstract: Models cooperation evolution in group interactions revealing nonlinear relationships between defection sensitivity and cooperation.

signals.title: Tensor Network Portfolio Optimization on Coherent Ising Machines
signals.abstract: Block coordinate descent for large-scale portfolio optimization on quantum hardware with competitive results.

signals.title: OccAny: Generalized 3D Occupancy for Autonomous Driving
signals.abstract: Unconstrained 3D occupancy model operates on out-of-domain scenes without calibration for autonomous vehicles.

signals.title: RelayS2S: Dual-Path Real-Time Dialogue with 99% Quality
signals.abstract: Hybrid speech-to-speech architecture achieves low-latency onset while maintaining 99% quality of slower pipeline.

signals.title: Planning over 10,000 Multi-Agent Pathfinding Dependencies
signals.abstract: Scales priority-based pathfinding to 10,000 agents under kinodynamic constraints.

signals.title: Quantum Speedup from Nonclassical Polarization
signals.abstract: Persistent √N speedup scaling with photon number from polarization coherence via speed limits.

signals.title: Asymptotic Learning Curves for Diffusion Models on Manifold Data
signals.abstract: Sample complexity scales with intrinsic dimension rather than ambient dimension for denoising score matching.

signals.title: Solving Nonlinear PDEs via Hybrid Quantum Newton Method
signals.abstract: Modified HHL algorithm for Newton's method addressing fluid dynamics computational challenges.

signals.title: Modeling Disjunction Effect within Classical Probability
signals.abstract: Classical and quantum-like decision models have equivalent observable expressiveness for cognitive anomalies.

signals.title: High-Resolution Tensor-Network for Non-Gaussian Aggregate Distributions
signals.abstract: Polylogarithmic complexity for financial risk calculations using low-rank tensor structures.

signals.title: SpecEyes: Accelerating Agentic Multimodal LLMs
signals.abstract: 1.1-3.35x speedup for agentic multimodal LLMs via speculative perception.

signals.title: Edge Radar Material Classification Under Geometry Shifts
signals.abstract: Lightweight mmWave radar classification for edge devices with 94.2% accuracy.

signals.title: Global Control via Quantum Actuators
signals.abstract: Auxiliary systems enable global control of quantum processors enhancing connectivity and long-range entanglement.

signals.title: Near-Optimal Carbon Capture Multi-Configuration Analysis (European)
signals.abstract: Duplicate removed — merged with rank 5.

signals.title: LLM-Generated Tests Degrade Under Software Evolution
signals.abstract: LLM tests rely on surface-level patterns, degrading significantly under semantic-altering modifications.

signals.title: Foveated Diffusion: Human Perception-Guided Efficient Generation
signals.abstract: Non-uniform token allocation based on human visual perception reduces generation time while maintaining quality.

signals.title: s_spiritual Signal: AI Error Attribution Amplifies Human Cognitive Biases
signals.abstract: Duplicate entry removed.
